note: Real-curated validation fixture. Held-out future evidence stays separate from event-time replay inputs.

rows.expected_observable: Later reported results should show revenue pressure extending beyond the fourth-quarter release.
rows.label: validated
rows.what_happened: Held-out Q1 fiscal 2025 results reported revenue down 10% reported and NIKE Direct revenue down 13%, supporting the replay-time fiscal 2025 demand reset narrative.

rows.expected_observable: Future results should keep NIKE Direct and digital revenue declines central.
rows.label: pending
rows.what_happened: Held-out Q1 results showed NIKE Direct revenue down 13%, but the public validation label remains pending because the broader demand reset better explains the event-time move.

rows.expected_observable: Future commentary should cite Greater China or macro uncertainty as the main driver.
rows.label: pending
rows.what_happened: Pending separate curation of the geographic and macro contribution; held-out Q1 results showed declines across geographies but the replay winner was broader.

rows.expected_observable: Follow-up discussion should emphasize margin expansion and EPS resilience over demand weakness.
rows.label: invalidated
rows.what_happened: Held-out Q1 results still showed gross-margin improvement, but revenue, Direct, wholesale, and EPS declined, weakening a margin-led explanation for the original selloff.
